headline: Peak Design’s modular Field Bracket has a finder tag built-in
summary: Peak Design introduces a new modular Field Bracket for cameras. The bracket features a built-in finder tag, useful for clumsy owners. It's designed to prevent loss, as exemplified by the author's past experiences.

headline: Nearly every Kindle is steeply discounted at Best Buy
summary: Best Buy is offering significant discounts on most Kindle models. The Kindle Paperwhite is at an all-time low of $124.99 ($35 off). This sale is part of Best Buy's 'Black Friday in July' event.

headline: Apple’s rumored ‘Upgrade’ program brings lease-to-own pricing for iPhones, Macs, and iPads
summary: Apple is reportedly launching an 'Apple Upgrade' program. It will offer lease-to-own options for iPhones, Macs, and iPads. Users can upgrade early or keep/return devices at lease end, similar to car leases.

headline: Twitch will let parents stop their teens going live
summary: Twitch introduces new parental controls for accounts of 13-17 year olds. Parents can now block their teenagers from broadcasting live streams. Features include account management and weekly activity summaries via email.

headline: Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu Now Available Online After Disappointing Box Office Run
summary: Star Wars: Mandalorian and Grogu is now available for digital rental or purchase. The movie experienced a disappointing box office performance. It now holds the title for the lowest-grossing live-action Star Wars film.

headline: A Free Dungeon Crawler Carl Flash Game Is Now Available to Play Online
summary: A new, free Flash game based on Dungeon Crawler Carl is released. The game features the character Princess Donut. It is available to play online for free.

headline: Robocop Gets New Reboot Series Coming to Prime Video
summary: An eight-episode Robocop reboot series is coming to Prime Video. James Wan, creator of The Conjuring, will executive produce. The series promises a fresh take on the classic franchise.

headline: The Mandalorian and Grogu’s 4K Steelbook Is Up for Preorder – Here’s Where To Buy It
summary: The Mandalorian and Grogu 4K Steelbook is now available for preorder. Collector's Edition, standard 4K, and Blu-ray versions are also listed. The release date for these physical copies is August 25.

headline: Ann Widdecombe was hit on head 21 times with hammer, prosecutors say
summary: Ann Widdecombe was reportedly attacked with a hammer at her Devon home. Prosecutors state she was hit 21 times while eating lunch. Joshua Kerry, 28, allegedly assaulted her and stole her wallet.

headline: Burnham tells cabinet to tackle living costs at first meeting
summary: New Prime Minister Burnham chaired his inaugural cabinet meeting. He instructed his cabinet to prioritize tackling the rising cost of living. This follows his announcement of a VAT cut on household electricity.

headline: Sackings, cabinet surprises and policies: Burnham's first 24 hours as PM
summary: New Prime Minister Burnham had a busy first 24 hours in office. His initial actions included cabinet changes and new policy announcements. He is currently facing calls for a snap election.

headline: Argentina's Fernandez defends team after ugly scenes in World Cup final loss to Spain
summary: Argentina lost to Spain in the World Cup final, marred by ugly scenes. Midfielder Enzo Fernandez defended his team's performance. He claimed Argentina represented their nation 'in the best possible way.'
